hero.title: Pre-Primary School
hero.subtitle: Nurturing young minds with love, care, and playful learning for Nursery, LKG & UKG

overview.title: Welcome to Pre-Primary School
overview.description: Our Pre-Primary program (Nursery, LKG, UKG) provides a warm, secure, and stimulating environment where young children develop foundational skills through play, exploration, and joyful learning experiences. We focus on holistic development that nurtures curiosity, creativity, and confidence.

teachingApproach.title: Play-Based Learning
teachingApproach.description: Learning through purposeful play, exploration, and hands-on activities that stimulate cognitive, social, and emotional growth.

teachingApproach.title: Child-Centered Approach
teachingApproach.description: Curriculum designed around children's interests, needs, and developmental stages.

teachingApproach.title: Multi-Sensory Learning
teachingApproach.description: Engaging all senses to enhance learning and retention through varied experiences.

teachingApproach.title: Emotional Nurturing
teachingApproach.description: Building secure attachments, emotional intelligence, and positive self-esteem.

ageGroups.title: Age Group Overview
ageGroups.description: Our program is designed to meet the developmental needs of each age group

groups.description: Focus on social skills, basic language, and motor development through structured play.
Developing pre-academic skills, creativity, and independence through guided activities.
Preparing for formal schooling with enhanced cognitive and social-emotional skills.

curriculum.title: Pre-Primary Curriculum
curriculum.description: A balanced, developmentally appropriate curriculum designed for young learners

learningAreas.name: Language Development
learningAreas.description: Listening, speaking, vocabulary building through stories, rhymes, and conversations

learningAreas.name: Early Mathematics
learningAreas.description: Number concepts, shapes, patterns, and measurement through games and activities

learningAreas.name: Environmental Awareness
learningAreas.description: Exploring the natural world, seasons, plants, animals, and community helpers

learningAreas.name: Creative Arts
learningAreas.description: Expression through drawing, painting, clay work, and craft activities

specialPrograms.name: Music & Movement
specialPrograms.description: Developing rhythm, coordination, and expression through songs and dance

specialPrograms.name: Play Time
specialPrograms.description: Structured and free play for social, emotional, and physical development

specialPrograms.name: Outdoor Learning
specialPrograms.description: Nature walks, gardening, and outdoor exploration

specialPrograms.name: Celebrations
specialPrograms.description: Cultural festivals, birthdays, and special events

assessmentMethods.description: Ongoing assessment through observation of play, interactions, and daily activities
Collection of children's work samples, photographs, and observations
Regular updates and discussions about child's progress and development

activities.title: Activities & Experiences
activities.description: Rich, varied experiences that foster holistic development

learningCenters.title: Reading Corner
learningCenters.description: Cozy space with picture books, story props, and puppets to foster love for reading.

learningCenters.title: Block Center
learningCenters.description: Building blocks, construction toys for spatial awareness and creativity.

learningCenters.title: Art Studio
learningCenters.description: Various art materials for creative expression and fine motor development.

learningCenters.title: Discovery Table
learningCenters.description: Natural materials, magnifying glasses, and simple science exploration tools.

specialEvents.name: Sports Day
specialEvents.description: Fun races and motor skill activities

specialEvents.name: Nature Walk
specialEvents.description: Exploring the school garden and surroundings

parentPartnership.title: Parent Orientation
parentPartnership.description: Initial meeting to understand the program and build partnership

parentPartnership.title: Home-School Connection
parentPartnership.description: Regular updates, newsletters, and suggested home activities

parentPartnership.title: Classroom Visits
parentPartnership.description: Parents invited for special events and celebrations

parentPartnership.title: Parent Workshops
parentPartnership.description: Sessions on child development, parenting, and early learning

facilities.title: Child-Friendly Facilities
facilities.description: Safe, secure, and stimulating environments designed for young children
specializedAreas: Indoor Play Area with soft mats

safetyMeasures.title: Secure Environment
safetyMeasures.description: Controlled access, CCTV surveillance, and secure boundaries

safetyMeasures.title: Health & Hygiene
safetyMeasures.description: Regular sanitization, first-aid, and health checks

safetyMeasures.title: Nutrition
safetyMeasures.description: Healthy snacks and drinking water availability

safetyMeasures.title: Staff Training
safetyMeasures.description: Trained in child safety, first-aid, and emergency procedures

admissionsCta.title: Begin Your Child's Learning Journey
admissionsCta.description: Join our nurturing pre-primary community and give your child the best start to their educational journey.

contactInfo.title: Have Questions About Our Pre-Primary Program?
contactInfo.hours:
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM
